violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Rice was observed in containers greater than four inches deep. Food items were placed into shallower containers during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

Various food items (soups, Sauces, Rice, Meats) prepared in advance was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Inspector demonstrated how to date mark and what items need a date. PIC labeled and dated food items at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023
